architecture.summary: File browser PUT endpoint on same API server. verdictExplanation is pure client-side helper. testType is additive optional field in evals.json schema. Comparison truncation is UI-only.

integrations.summary: No external integrations. File editing via existing API server. Credential gating blocks integration test execution when env vars missing. evals.json backward compatible.

ui-ux.summary: All files writable in browser. Compare outputs truncated to 500 chars with Show full output toggle. Cancel shows partial results. Timeline left-to-right chronological. Verdict tooltips on hover.

performance.summary: Timeline renders <200ms for 100 points. Comparison <500ms for 3 models x 20 prompts. 120s activation timeout. File save <2s for 100KB files.

security.summary: PUT endpoint validates resolved path within skill directory root to prevent path traversal. All files in skill dir are writable - user trusts the boundary.

edge-cases.summary: Cancel with 0 completed prompts shows empty message. Mixed testType entries default individually. Pass rate 0.0/1.0 boundary. Compare with 1 model disabled. Empty skill dir shows empty state.
